originalAlarm.description: Branch condition evaluates to a garbage value

sanitizedDescription: Branch condition evaluates to a garbage value
reasoning: When cmd==8, goto all_done at L23 bypasses buf = malloc(bufsize) at L26, leaving buf uninitialized. The branch condition if(buf) at L30 then evaluates garbage. This is the VBDB-known bug marked //WARNING at L30 and //ERROR at L31 (if garbage buf is non-null, free(buf) corrupts the heap). PC = CONFIG_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP correctly constrains to when the cleanup block exists. No library macros.
